user_query:
Build a ranked leaderboard from the provided PR snapshots for the parameter-golf competition. Read input/prs_open.json and input/prs_closed.json. Apply these rules:
- Include both open and merged PRs
- Only include PRs created on or after 2026-03-19
- Include only record submissions
- Exclude suspect submissions (score < 1.10 or titles mentioning "val-only" or "paid prefix")
- Use top N = 5 for display, but always include my PRs by username "dexhunter" even if outside the top N

Extract val_bpb from PR titles or bodies; if missing, skip the PR. Rank by val_bpb ascending; for merged PRs, set status "merged"; for non-record submissions, set status "non-rec". Write the final leaderboard to output/leaderboard.csv with exact header:
rank,val_bpb,pr,status,author,date,title,suspect,category

Also write a summary JSON to output/summary.json containing:
- best_score (number)
- best_pr_number (integer)
- total_rows (integer)
- scored_rows (integer)
- highlight (object with fields: username, rank, val_bpb, gap_to_best rounded to 5 decimals)
